candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Higher-gain unstable reference: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the fully live successor-increment formulation.
Formulation-local substitution: keep the live detached local-field anchor term and swap only the learned residual term to its cached analogue before the preterminal angle clip.
Formulation-local substitution: swap only the detached local-field anchor term to its cached analogue while keeping the learned residual term live before the preterminal angle clip.

increment_formulation_component_table.used_for: detached local-field anchor term inside the raw preterminal live successor velocity
learned residual correction added on top of the live detached local-field anchor

increment_formulation_component_table.where_produced: _plan_tf2_micro_step raw on-policy velocity before the angle clip
increment_formulation_component_table.used_for: raw preterminal live successor velocity where u_on_live = g_t_live + u_res_live

increment_formulation_component_table.where_produced: derived as dt * u_on_live before any preterminal angle clip
increment_formulation_component_table.used_for: raw live preterminal successor increment under formulation-level decomposition

increment_formulation_component_table.where_produced: derived as u_on_cached - g_t_cached from the cached preterminal plan
derived from the cached preterminal successor value as (z_on_next_cached - z_on_k_cached) / dt
increment_formulation_component_table.used_for: cached raw successor velocity analogue where u_on_cached = g_t_cached + u_res_cached

increment_formulation_component_table.where_produced: derived as dt * u_on_cached from the cached preterminal plan
